## Checklist

- [ ] Scoped to one artifact (or explained why it spans several)
- [ ] Builds + tests pass locally for each affected artifact
- [ ] **Version bumped** in the manifest / `VERSION` file (per [VERSIONING.md](../VERSIONING.md))
- [ ] **`CHANGELOG.md` updated** for each affected artifact, in the same commit as the version bump
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `USER_GUIDE.md`) if the public API, config, or install steps changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or tenant identifiers in code, tests, or fixtures
